result:
Done. Here's a summary of what was created:

## `extensions/mistral-portal-auth/` — 6 files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | NPM manifest (`@openclaw/mistral-portal-auth`, private, ESM) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin metadata — registers `mistral-portal` provider |
| `config-schema.ts` | TypeBox config schema (`apiKey`, `baseUrl`), `validateApiKey` (local format check), `validateApiKeyRemote` (calls `/v1/models` to verify) |
| `oauth.ts` | Device-code PKCE OAuth flow against `auth.mistral.ai` — `requestDeviceCode`, `pollDeviceToken` (handles `authorization_pending`, `slow_down`, `access_denied`, `expired_token`), `refreshOAuthToken` for token rotation, `loginMistralPortalOAuth` orchestrator |
| `index.ts` | Plugin entry — registers provider with 5 models (mistral-large, mistral-medium, mistral-small, codestral, pixtral-large), OAuth onboarding handler with post-login validation, `refreshOAuth` callback for automatic token rotation |
| `index.test.ts` | **17 passing tests** covering: key validation (4), remote validation (3), OAuth device-code flow (4), token refresh (3), plugin registration (2), config schema shape (1) |

Also updated `.github/labeler.yml` with the `extensions: mistral-portal-auth` label.
